source_fact_summary: The public issue says a code-agent PR modified generic scaffold skill definitions but copied repo-specific docs/plans references from the originating issue into reusable templates. Human review comments requested removal because scaffolded skills should not hardcode those project paths.
unsupported_claims: The exact breadth of downstream repositories affected by the generic scaffold templates still needs manual confirmation.
category_change_reason: No category change suggested: the source ties the defect to fixed repo-specific paths being copied into generic reusable scaffold outputs.
privacy_findings: Only public GitHub issue or PR links and short factual summaries are retained; no credentials, private files, raw logs, or local absolute paths were copied.
severity_reason: Repo-specific hardcoded paths in reusable scaffolds can mislead generated skills across projects, but the source evidence is strongest for the PR review context.
missing_information: Manual review should inspect the inline review comments and affected scaffold outputs before formal use.
scope_reason: The source connects an Agent PR to a project artifact containing fixed paths inappropriate for generic scaffolds. Git diff and template/file inspection can detect it, but full downstream impact needs human confirmation.
notes: Codex review suggestion only: public-source accessibility and category/scope recommendations do not mark the candidate source_verified, approved, or reproduced. Manual confirmation remains required.
